arguments.file_text:
# CPM Conversion Report — Enterprise.slnx

## 1. Conversion Overview

| Item | Detail |
|------|--------|
| **Scope** | `Enterprise.slnx` (solution) |
| **Projects converted** | 5 (Api, Core, Legacy, Tests, Web) |
| **Packages centralized** | 7 unique packages |
| **Shared props updated** | `Common.props` (Microsoft.Extensions.Logging) |
| **MSBuild properties inlined** | `$(BlobsVersion)` → `12.24.0`, `$(HostingVersion)` → `8.0.1` (removed from `Directory.Build.props`) |
| **Conditional PackageVersion entries** | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson (net6.0 → 6.0.36, net8.0 → 8.0.11) |

## 2. Version Conflict Resolutions

Two version conflicts were resolved by aligning to the highest version:

### System.Text.Json

| Version | Projects |
|---------|----------|
| 10.0.1 | Web, Api, Tests |
| 9.0.0 | Core |
| 8.0.5 | Legacy |

**Resolution**: Aligned to **10.0.1** (highest). Core and Legacy now resolve a higher version than before.

### Azure.Storage.Blobs

| Version | Projects |
|---------|----------|
| 12.24.0 | Api (was `$(BlobsVersion)`) |
| 12.19.0 | Legacy |

**Resolution**: Aligned to **12.24.0** (highest). Legacy now resolves 12.24.0 instead of 12.19.0.

## 3. Package Comparison — Baseline vs. Result

### Changes

| Project | TFM | Package | Before | After | Status |
|---------|-----|---------|--------|-------|--------|
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 9.0.0 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 | 12.24.0 | Aligned to highest version |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |

### Unchanged

| Project | TFM | Package | Version |
|---------|-----|---------|---------|
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 6.0.36 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 8.0.11 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 |
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | xunit | 2.9.3 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |

## 4. Risk Assessment

**[Moderate risk]** — Three packages changed resolved versions due to alignment to the highest version:

- **Core.csproj**: System.Text.Json 9.0.0 → 10.0.1 (major version bump)
- **Legacy.csproj**: System.Text.Json 8.0.5 → 10.0.1 (major version bump), Azure.Storage.Blobs 12.19.0 → 12.24.0 (minor version bump)

The build and restore succeeded. The System.Text.Json major version bumps in Core and Legacy carry the highest risk — review for breaking API changes and run `dotnet test` to verify no regressions.

## 5. Follow-Up Items

1. **Test validation**: Run `dotnet test` to validate runtime behavior, especially for Core and Legacy which received major System.Text.Json version bumps (9.0.0 → 10.0.1 and 8.0.5 → 10.0.1 respectively).
2. **System.Text.Json breaking changes**: Review the [System.Text.Json 10.0 release notes](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/whats-new/dotnet-10/overview) for any breaking changes affecting Core and Legacy.
3. **Azure.Storage.Blobs minor bump**: Review the [Azure.Storage.Blobs changelog](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.Blobs/CHANGELOG.md) for changes between 12.19.0 and 12.24.0 affecting Legacy.
4. **EOL target framework**: Api.csproj and Legacy.csproj target `net6.0` which is out of support. Consider upgrading to `net8.0` or later.

## 6. Artifacts and How to Use Them

| Artifact | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `baseline.binlog` | MSBuild binary log captured before CPM conversion |
| `after-cpm.binlog` | MSBuild binary log captured after CPM conversion |
| `baseline-packages.json` | Resolved package versions per project before conversion |
| `after-cpm-packages.json` | Resolved package versions per project after conversion |
| `convert-to-cpm.md` | This report file |

Binlogs can be opened with the [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/) for detailed build comparison and troubleshooting. Run `dotnet test` to validate runtime behavior beyond build success.

data.content:
All validation checks pass. Here's a summary:

**Conversion complete.** 5 projects in `Enterprise.slnx` are now using Central Package Management.

**What was done:**
- Created `Directory.Packages.props` with 7 centralized packages (sorted alphabetically)
- Removed `Version` from all `PackageReference` items across 5 `.csproj` files and `Common.props`
- Inlined `$(BlobsVersion)` → `12.24.0` and `$(HostingVersion)` → `8.0.1`, then removed both from `Directory.Build.props`
- Used conditional `<PackageVersion>` entries for `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson` (6.0.36 on net6.0, 8.0.11 on net8.0)
- Aligned version conflicts to highest: System.Text.Json → 10.0.1, Azure.Storage.Blobs → 12.24.0

**Risk: Moderate** — Core and Legacy received major System.Text.Json version bumps. Run `dotnet test` to validate.

**Artifacts preserved:** `baseline.binlog`, `after-cpm.binlog`, `baseline-packages.json`, `after-cpm-packages.json`, `convert-to-cpm.md`
